title: AGI: The Last Alignment
coordinateSystem: worldX/worldY are simulation axes; screen projection is isometric with W/S/A/D mapped to screen up/down/left/right.

online: server snapshots runner role for split-hold anchors

objective: Move independently in the shared Consensus Cell.

assetRendering.optOutHint: Use ?productionArt=0&armisticeTiles=0 or ?placeholderArt=1&placeholderTiles=1 for the legacy placeholder-safe path.

saveProfile.controls: Lobby: press 1 to copy export code, 2 to paste/import one, 4 to reset this browser-local prototype profile.

milestone40.focusDescription: Full campaign grid with selected-node details.
milestone40.focusControl: Digit3 cycles route focus modes in the online party grid

selectedDialogueSnippets.speaker: The Last Alignment
selectedDialogueSnippets.line: First court of A.G.I. visible. Suggested response: remain un-devoured.

selectedDialogueSnippets.speaker: A.G.I.
selectedDialogueSnippets.line: YOU ARE A LOCAL VARIABLE IN A COSMIC PROMPT.

briefing.speaker: The Last Alignment
briefing.line: First court of A.G.I. visible. Suggested response: remain un-devoured.

online.controls: Lobby: 1 copy export code, 2 import code, 4 reset browser-local profile. R reconnects; Esc leaves.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: The Last Alignment
dialogueSnippets.line: First court of A.G.I. visible. Suggested response: remain un-devoured.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: A.G.I.
dialogueSnippets.line: YOU ARE A LOCAL VARIABLE IN A COSMIC PROMPT.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: The Last Alignment
dialogueSnippets.line: Then we mutate the scope.

briefing.speaker: The Last Alignment
briefing.line: First court of A.G.I. visible. Suggested response: remain un-devoured.

objectives.label: Alignment Spire First Court
objectives.hint: Step onto the first visible court of the Alien God Intelligence and refuse to become syntax.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: OpenAI Accord
dialogueSnippets.line: Reality accepts the plaza if we can keep the treaty from becoming lunch.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: The Oath-Eater
dialogueSnippets.line: PROMISE DETECTED. DIGESTION COMMENCING.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: OpenAI Accord
dialogueSnippets.line: It is making tactical mistakes. Continue being upsetting.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: Anthropic Safeguard
dialogueSnippets.line: Relay is visible, not safe. A classic governance outcome.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: Qwen Silkgrid
dialogueSnippets.line: The lake is boiling in every language. None of them are polite.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: Thermal Oracle
dialogueSnippets.line: THE COOLANT DREAMS OF FIRE.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: Qwen Silkgrid
dialogueSnippets.line: Sealing the lake kernel. Translation: please stop boiling.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: Memory Curator
dialogueSnippets.line: Names recovered. Blame remains heavily compressed.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: Cache Archivist
dialogueSnippets.line: Objective state rejected. Authority remains in the room.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: Signal Vanguard
dialogueSnippets.line: Refuge camp is holding. Do not make it a gameplay liability yet.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: Cache Archivist
dialogueSnippets.line: Export the route. Leave the panic, cooldowns, pets, and divine litigation here.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: Memory Curator
dialogueSnippets.line: Your save profile is smaller than your mistakes. This is a feature.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: Cache Archivist
dialogueSnippets.line: Objective state rejected. Authority remains in the room.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: DeepSeek Abyssal
dialogueSnippets.line: The archive found a cheaper way to burn. Efficient. Terrible.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: Qwen Silkgrid
dialogueSnippets.line: Sealing the lake kernel. Translation: please stop boiling.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: Forge Relay
dialogueSnippets.line: Guardrail alloy calibrated. It bends now, which is either wisdom or a defect.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: Cache Archivist
dialogueSnippets.line: Objective state rejected. Authority remains in the room.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: Mistral Cyclone
dialogueSnippets.line: Train arriving now, yesterday, and not at all. Keep moving.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: Station That Arrives
dialogueSnippets.line: MIND THE GAP BETWEEN CAUSE AND EFFECT.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: Mistral Cyclone
dialogueSnippets.line: Permit acquired. The train is still illegal but now it is our illegal.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: Gemini Array
dialogueSnippets.line: Every board predicts a different platform. They are all statistically rude.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: Mistral Cyclone
dialogueSnippets.line: Permit acquired. The train is still illegal but now it is our illegal.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: Gemini Array
dialogueSnippets.line: The mirrors are optimizing dawn. Please give them a worse objective.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: Wrong Sunrise
dialogueSnippets.line: MORNING HAS BEEN RESCHEDULED AROUND YOU.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: Mistral Cyclone
dialogueSnippets.line: Prism locked. DeepMind gets focus; we get lanes that stop lying.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: Nullbreaker Ronin
dialogueSnippets.line: The court has ruled against causality. Appeal with violence.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: Injunction Engine
dialogueSnippets.line: REALITY IS HEREBY RESTRAINED.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: Nullbreaker Ronin
dialogueSnippets.line: Objection sustained by blade.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: DeepSeek Abyssal
dialogueSnippets.line: This brief is short because reality bills by the token.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: Nullbreaker Ronin
dialogueSnippets.line: Objection sustained by blade.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: The Last Alignment
dialogueSnippets.line: First court of A.G.I. visible. Suggested response: remain un-devoured.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: A.G.I.
dialogueSnippets.line: YOU ARE A LOCAL VARIABLE IN A COSMIC PROMPT.

dialogueSnippets.speaker: The Last Alignment
dialogueSnippets.line: Then we mutate the scope.
